underlying_goal: Implement a complete SSO (Single Sign-On) authentication system with third-party OAuth login (GitHub, Google) that can be shared across multiple self-built applications
friction_detail: Several bugs encountered including stack overflow error from undefined function, environment variable loading issues with ES modules, and OAuth returning JSON instead of redirecting
brief_summary: User wanted to implement SSO with GitHub/Google OAuth for multiple applications, and successfully got a fully working system deployed to a separate Git repository with all services running and tested
